name: Field
comment:
A `Field` is a simple data type that helps capture and validate form data better.
The left side of a field represents a function that takes in a value of arbitrary type,
validates it and returns a `ValidationResult`.
The `ValidationResult` can contain the value of the field if the validation `Passed`, or
an error if the validation `Failed`


# Definition

@docs Field


# Helpers

@docs value, update, validate, validateAll, isValid, isAllValid


# Mapping

@docs map

unions.name: Field
unions.comment: Type that helps capture and validate form data better

values.name: isAllValid
values.comment: Check if all Fields in the list are valid

values.name: isValid
values.comment: Check if a Field is valid

values.name: map
values.type: (v -> v) -> Field e v -> Field e v

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the value of a Field
values.type: Field e v -> v -> Field e v

values.name: validate
values.comment: Validate a Field and get a `ValidationResult`

values.name: validateAll
values.comment: Validate a List of Fields and get a List of `ValidationResult`

values.name: value
values.comment: Extract the value out of a Field

name: Field.ValidationResult

unions.name: ValidationResult
unions.comment:
A `ValidationResult` describes the state of a `Field` once it has been validated.
It can contain the value of the field if the validation `Passed` or
an error if the validation `Failed`

values.name: andThen
values.type: (v -> ValidationResult e v) -> ValidationResult e v -> ValidationResult e v

values.name: contraMap
values.comment:
Apply a function to a `ValidationResult`. If the `ValidationResult` is `Failed`, it will be converted.
if the `ValidationResult` has `Passed` then the passed state will propogate
values.type: (a -> b) -> ValidationResult a x -> ValidationResult b x

values.name: filterFailures
values.type: List (ValidationResult e v) -> List (ValidationResult e v)

values.name: filterPassed
values.type: List (ValidationResult e v) -> List (ValidationResult e v)

values.name: map
values.comment:
Apply a function to a `ValidationResult`. If the `ValidationResult` is `Passed`, it will be converted.
if the `ValidationResult` has `Failed` then the failure will propogate
values.type: (a -> b) -> ValidationResult x a -> ValidationResult x b
